essence: Produces moving‑image content from planning through shooting to post‑production for a variety of platforms.

identity.title: Videographer
identity.summary: Captures and edits video, manages lighting and sound, and delivers finished content for events, marketing, or storytelling.

salary.notes: Specialist cinematographers and editors working in film or high‑end commercial production earn more.

qualifications: Portfolio of video work and technical proficiency with cameras and editing software
Experience with lighting, sound recording, and post‑production
Strong storytelling and project management skills
Ability to work to briefs and tight deadlines

lifestyle.description: Project and deadline driven with a mix of location shoots and editing suites; client interaction and creative problem solving common.
